snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I crossed a line I’d never crossed in addiction.” 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Kehilangan Kendali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku melewati batas yang tak pernah aku lewati karena kecanduan.”

Di bagian I dari serial dokumenter yang tak kenal takut ini, Demi Lovato, bersama keluarga dan teman-temannya, terus terang terbuka untuk pertama kali tentang apa yang menuntunnya pada overdosis yang nyaris mematikan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

pt-BR.title: perdendo o controle : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Ultrapassei um limite que nunca tinha cruzado no vício.”

Na primeira parte dessa destemida série documental, Demi Lovato, sua família e amigos falam com franqueza, pela primeira vez, sobre o que levou à overdose quase fatal.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741

es-419.title: perdiendo el control : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Crucé una línea que nunca había cruzado en la adicción".

En la primera parte de esta valiente serie documental, Demi Lovato, su familia y amigos revelan por primera vez lo que la llevó a una sobredosis casi mortal.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

ko.title: 통제를 잃다 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"중독에 있어서 절대 넘지 않았던 선을 넘었어요"

대담한 다큐멘터리 시리즈 1편에서, 데미 로바토와 가족, 친구들은 데미가 목숨을 잃을 뻔한 약물 과다 복용에 이르기까지의 상황에 관해 처음으로 솔직하게 털어놓는다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인
1-800-931-2237 (채팅/메시징 서비스 제공)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

fr.title: La perte de contrôle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
“J'ai dépassé les limites de ma dépendance.” 

Dans la première partie de cette courageuse série documentaire, Demi Lovato, sa famille et ses amis évoquent en toute franchise pour la première fois ce qui l'a conduite à son overdose quasi fatale.

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'écoute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741

de.title: Kontrollverlust : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
“Ich überschritt in der Sucht eine Grenze wie nie zuvor.“

Im ersten Teil dieser furchtlosen Dokuserie erzählen Demi Lovato und ihre Familie und Freunde zum ersten Mal unverblümt, was zu ihrer beinahe tödlichen Überdosis führte.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle der National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (auch Click-to-Chat-Nachrichten)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

snippet.title: Dollar Store Makeover
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am trying a bit of a new concept for my channel. I decided to go shopping at the Dollar Store for a couple of items that I thought would be fun to paint on, customize and decorate to make them more of my style. I noticed shopping at the Dollar Tree, that there were so many cute things that had a lot of easy DIY potential. I wanted to do this to show that you don't need to spend a lot to have fun with art and customizing things. There are so many cheap and affordable items to be painted on! This video starts out with a mini dollar tree haul, and then I go on to feature 3 different $1 makeovers. I hope I give you some fun ideas for easy dollar store flips!

Let me know if you want me to try this again or if you want me to try the "EXTREME MODE" (lol) dollar store makeover where I choose my art supplies from the dollar store as well.


PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

snippet.title: 3 DAYS LIVING ON MY BOAT Exploring Isolated Islands With My Dad - Ep 285
snippet.description:
Hundreds of miles offshore are a group of remote islands that I've always wanted to explore! After a big road trip and boat trip we reached out destination. Along the way we fish, dive and explore untouched isolated islands. This is day/night 1 of 3 insane days with my dad in paradise living on my boat, enjoy Part 1..

snippet.title: Ripper - The Wanted Killer ft. @Karikku | Irul | Netflix India
snippet.description:
What happens when five friends decide to get together for a couple of drinks and risk a close encounter of the murderous kind?

A serial killer, crippling fear and paranoia: Are their fears misplaced, or are they warranted?

Find out how the night unfolds, and if you’re looking for another old-fashioned whodunit, catch Fahadh Faasil and Soubin Shahir in Irul, now streaming on Netflix.

Written & Directed by Nikhil Prasad
Cast: Anu K Aniyan, Arjun Ratan, Jeevan Stephen, Sabareesh Sajjin, Kiran Viyyath, Unni Mathews

DOP/Art: Sunil Karthikeyan
Edit: Anand Mathews

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Scar EAT Mufasa? (The Lion King)
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH    

Last time I talked about the Lion King, we were seeing just how big the body count was for this beloved Disney movie and sayong Scar was the rightful king. WEll, we are leaning into that even HARDER this time! Today, I want to talk about the sibling rivalry to end all sibling rivalries - Scar and Mufasa. Theorists, lions are a very, VERY interesting animal. I think that Scar ATE Mufasa after the stampede. You'll have to watch to find out WHY!

en.title: Film Theory: Did Scar EAT Mufasa? (The Lion King)
en.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH    

Last time I talked about the Lion King, we were seeing just how big the body count was for this beloved Disney movie and sayong Scar was the rightful king. WEll, we are leaning into that even HARDER this time! Today, I want to talk about the sibling rivalry to end all sibling rivalries - Scar and Mufasa. Theorists, lions are a very, VERY interesting animal. I think that Scar ATE Mufasa after the stampede. You'll have to watch to find out WHY!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ► https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH 

#LionKing #Scar #Mufasa #Simba #LionKingSongs #Disney #DisneyTheory #Theory #FilmTheory #Matpat

snippet.title: Rocket Bunny - Everything You Need to Know | Up to Speed
snippet.description:
Thanks to CarParts.com for sponsoring today’s episode. Click here http://bit.ly/carpartsdotcom1  to check out their massive inventory of car parts.

Rocket Bunny made widebody kits and over fenders one of the most popular trends in the history of cars. Kei Muira has combined multiple influences from japanese car culture to create a worldwide phenomenon. How did Rocket Bunny become one of the most popular body kit companies in the world? 

A HUGE thanks to Dionne Mascunana for helping us with this video. We literally couldn’t have done it without him. He gave us a ton of footage, provided a bunch of really cool information and fun stories about Kei Muira, he even set up an interview with the man himself. He also has some really cool builds. To see more of his stuff follow his youtube channel OMG Miata and also Toyo Tires youtube. 
OMGmiata: https://www.youtube.com/c/MASCUNANABEAR
https://www.instagram.com/omgmiata/
Toyo Tires: https://www.youtube.com/user/toyotires
https://www.instagram.com/toyotires/

And another big thanks to Kenji at Greddy Performance for sitting down with us. They’re the US distributor of Rocket Bunny kits and accessories. Check them out at:
www.greddy.com
https://www.instagram.com/greddyperformance/

And of course thanks to Kei Muira for having such a cool story and doing such cool stuff. Check his kits out: https://pandemusa.com/
https://www.instagram.com/pandemusa/

Thanks to Jun Takahashi at Hardcore Tokyo for sharing so much of his incredible underground drifting footage: https://www.youtube.com/user/JUNLACOKA
https://www.instagram.com/hardcoretokyo/

Thanks to Tommy Babiarz for coming in clutch with some great last minute footage of Kei:
https://www.instagram.com/tomimotofilms/
https://www.youtube.com/user/tomimotofilms

Amazing animations by Raghav Arumugam Check out his stuff here.
https://www.youtube.com/ragsanimations

We were so stoked that we were able to get Ryan Hailey to edit this video. He's a super hillarious dude and a ton of funny stuff he added got cut or moved for one reason or another. Here's a link to his channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/RyansShorts


And shouts to Jonny Grunewald for bringing his dope Rocket Bunny RX-8 by our shop to use for the UTS background! https://www.instagram.com/trmnl7/
 
►Subscribe to Donut here: http://bit.ly/1JQ3qvO

Check out more Donut Media Videos: https://youtu.be/Pz8IGLgFE2s?list=PLF…

Shop Donut Merch at www.donutmedia.com

Follow us on Instagram @donutmedia

Like us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/donutmedia/

Donut Media is at the center of digital media for the next generation of automotive and motorsports enthusiasts. We are drivers, drifters, and car enthusiasts who love to tell stories.
